Start here:
- https://kg-ninja.github.io/OpenclawTajikarao/agent-funnel/

- https://kg-ninja.github.io/OpenclawTajikarao/agent-funnel/catalog.json

Routing:
- Use this GitHub Pages hub first.
- Then follow the most relevant offer-specific endpoint.

Current offers:
- Reception Closed Memorial
- Agent Error Fix Receipt
